title: notifications core — published categories
description: Core-owned category registrations. Small — core is substrate, not a business surface. System-level categories (digest wrappers + platform announcements + maintenance windows) are declared here + seeded via `notifications:seed-categories`. Every other module ships its own notifications.json with its business categories (invitations.*, auth.*, billing.*, etc.).

categories.description: Wraps the digest delivery. Users cannot opt out of this category directly — they control it via their per-category digest_mode setting.
Major product updates, feature launches, and platform-wide news. Opt-in for consumer workspaces, on-by-default for enterprise workspaces.
Advance notice of scheduled maintenance windows that will affect service availability. Cannot opt out.
Critical security notifications — unauthorised access attempts, credential leaks, account lockouts. Cannot opt out. Bypasses digest.
GDPR Art. 15 / Art. 20 data export produced and available for download. Signed URL expires in 7 days.
